parsed.production_notes: The video uses a mix of human footage that appears heavily filtered or AI-enhanced, evidenced by slightly unnatural lip-syncing and overly smooth skin textures on the presenter. The robot character is entirely AI-generated, and the split-screen interaction features perfectly static camera angles typical of AI composites.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s, muscular build, tan complexion, short dark hair with a fade, and a neatly trimmed dark beard. He has expressive facial features and a friendly demeanor.
characters.wardrobe: A cream-colored, short-sleeve textured polo shirt and a thin gold necklace.

characters.appearance: A humanoid robot with a smooth white face, bright blue eyes, and visible mechanical joints at the neck. It has a highly symmetrical, artificial appearance.
characters.wardrobe: A traditional red and white checkered ghutra (keffiyeh) secured with a black agal.
characters.demeanor: Helpful, polite, and artificially expressive with robotic head movements.

scenes.setting: Dimly lit lounge and restaurant, evening, warm ambient lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A man sits in a dimly lit lounge, facing slightly left towards an off-screen person. He wears a cream-colored textured polo shirt and a gold chain. The background features blurred city lights and warm ambient lighting. He gestures with his hands as he speaks. Quick cuts show him sitting at a restaurant table with a fork and knife, looking confused, before returning to the lounge setting.

scenes.visual_description: The scene cuts between the presenter in a lounge setting and a restaurant setting. He is explaining common English mistakes. Text overlays in Arabic and English highlight the phrases he is discussing. A red 'X' graphic appears over his face when he demonstrates incorrect phrases.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: أبداً لا تقول "I'm fine, thank you". [Never say "I'm fine, thank you".]
Character A says: I'm fine, thank you. [I'm fine, thank you.]
Character A says: I don't know. [I don't know.]
Character A says: You are welcome. [You are welcome.]
Character A says: حتى أنا كنت أتكلم چذي. [Even I used to speak like this.]
Character A says: لين بديت أتدرب ويا Learna! [Until I started practicing with Learna!]
Character A says: دعني أريك إياه. [Let me show it to you.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ابدأ بالتحدث باللغة الإنجليزية بطلاقة! (Start speaking English fluently!)
أبداً لا تقول (Never say)
"I'm fine, thank you".
I'm fine, thank you
I don't know
You are welcome
حتى أنا كنت أتكلم چذي. (Even I used to speak like this.)
لين بديت أتدرب ويا (Until I started practicing with)
Learna!
دعني أريك إياه. (Let me show it to you.)

scenes.setting: Abstract digital space, blurred warm interior background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A humanoid robot with a white face and blue eyes is wearing a traditional red and white checkered ghutra and black agal. The robot faces forward, speaking with expressive mechanical movements. The background is a softly blurred, warm-toned interior.

A large, modern smartphone is displayed vertically, floating in mid-air. The phone rotates slightly, showing various colorful screens and interfaces. The background matches the softly blurred, warm-toned interior of the left panel.

scenes.visual_description: The screen is split vertically. On the left, the AI robot avatar speaks directly to the camera. On the right, a 3D mockup of a smartphone displays the Learna app interface, showing features like the app store page, tutor selection, and chat interfaces. Arabic text overlays appear in the center, translating the robot's speech.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: هلا والله. [Hello there.]
Character B says: تدري إنك تقدر تتكلم إنجليزي مثل الأجانب في 1 أسبوع بس! [Did you know you can speak English like foreigners in just 1 week!]
Character B says: بس هذا مو سحر، هذا Learna. [But this is not magic, this is Learna.]
Character B says: أبلكيشن يصحح لك وين تسولف ويعلمك بدون ما تحس أصلاً. [An application that corrects you while you chat and teaches you without you even noticing.]
Character B says: يلا، خلونا نجرب هو سوا. [Come on, let's try it together.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
هلا والله. (Hello there.)
تدري إنك تقدر (Did you know you can)
تتكلم إنجليزي (speak English)
مثل الأجانب (like foreigners)
في 1 أسبوع بس! (in just 1 week!)
بس هذا مو سحر، (But this is not magic,)
هذا Learna. (this is Learna.)
أبلكيشن (An application)
يصحح لك وين تسولف (that corrects you while you chat)
ويعلمك بدون (and teaches you without)
ما تحس أصلاً. (you even noticing.)
يلا، (Come on,)
خلونا نجرب (let's try it)
هو سوا. (together.)

scenes.setting: Home office with a bookshelf and night city view, and a digital soundwave background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A humanoid robot wearing a red and white checkered ghutra and black agal is centered against a solid black background. Concentric white circular lines radiate outward from behind the robot's head, resembling sound waves. The robot faces forward.

A man wearing a cream-colored textured polo shirt and a gold chain sits at a wooden desk. A black studio microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. Behind him is a bookshelf filled with books and a window revealing a nighttime city skyline. He looks forward, speaking into the microphone.

scenes.visual_description: A horizontal split-screen shows the AI robot on top and the human presenter on the bottom, simulating a live video call or podcast recording. They engage in a conversation, with the robot acting as an English tutor. Arabic and English text overlays appear in the center, translating their dialogue. A money bag emoji appears when discussing cost.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: تتكلم إنجليزي؟ [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: شوي. [A little.]
Character B says: من وين إنت؟ Where are you from? [Where are you from? Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Saudi Arabia. [I am Saudi Arabia.]
Character B says: قربت. الأحسن تقول "I am from Saudi Arabia." [Close. It's better to say "I am from Saudi Arabia."]
Character A says: آخ، دايم أتلخبط فيها. [Ugh, I always get confused with that.]
Character B says: عشان كذا أنا موجود أساعدك تتكلم صح. [That's why I'm here to help you speak correctly.]
Character A says: بس ما عندي فلوس. [But I don't have money.]
Character B says: إيش؟ ما تحتاج فلوس. [What? You don't need money.]
Character B says: مع Learna تقدر تتمرن إنجليزي ببلاش. [With Learna you can practice English for free.]
Character B says: مو زي باقي التطبيقات أو الكورسات الغالية. [Not like other expensive apps or courses.]
Character A says: من جدك؟ [Are you serious?]
Character B says: أكيد. مافي حركات. [Sure. No tricks.]
Character B says: بس ممارسة محادثة إنجليزي من جد مع مدرس AI. [Just real English conversation practice with an AI teacher.]
Character A says: يعني... مدرس من جد؟ [You mean... a real teacher?]
Character B says: إيه، يصحح لك القرامر والنطق ويخليك تتكلم بثقة. [Yes, corrects your grammar and pronunciation and makes you speak with confidence.]
Character A says: اوكي، أجل بحمل Learna الحين. [Okay, then I'll download Learna now.]
Character B says: كفو! خلنا نتكلم إنجليزي سوا. [Awesome! Let's speak English together.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
تتكلم إنجليزي؟ (Do you speak English?)
شوي. (A little.)
من وين إنت؟ (Where are you from?)
Where are you from?
I am Saudi Arabia.
قربت. الأحسن تقول (Close. It's better to say)
"I am from Saudi Arabia."
آخ، دايم أتلخبط فيها. (Ugh, I always get confused with that.)
عشان كذا أنا موجود (That's why I'm here)
أساعدك تتكلم صح. (to help you speak correctly.)
بس ما عندي فلوس. (But I don't have money.)
إيش؟ ما تحتاج فلوس. (What? You don't need money.)
مع Learna تقدر تتمرن (With Learna you can practice)
إنجليزي ببلاش. (English for free.)
مو زي باقي التطبيقات أو (Not like other apps or)
الكورسات الغالية. (expensive courses.)
من جدك؟ (Are you serious?)
أكيد. مافي حركات. (Sure. No tricks.)
بس ممارسة محادثة (Just conversation practice)
إنجليزي من جد مع (real English with)
مدرس AI. (an AI teacher.)
يعني... مدرس من جد؟ (You mean... a real teacher?)
إيه، يصحح لك القرامر والنطق (Yes, corrects your grammar and pronunciation)
ويخليك تتكلم بثقة. (and makes you speak with confidence.)
اوكي، أجل بحمل Learna الحين. (Okay, then I'll download Learna now.)
كفو! خلنا نتكلم إنجليزي سوا. (Awesome! Let's speak English together.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark blue background. Centered in the frame is the head and upper torso of a silver humanoid robot with a smooth face and mechanical details on the neck and chest. The robot faces directly forward.

scenes.visual_description: A static end-card with a dark blue background. The Learna app icon, featuring a silver robot head, is prominently displayed in the center. Arabic text above encourages downloading the app. App Store and Google Play badges are positioned at the bottom.
scenes.on_screen_text:
